rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal. Educ. Code §39.021 governs State Board of Education essential skills and knowledge rules. No overlap.
quote: The State Board of Education by rule shall establish the essential skills and knowledge that all students should learn to achieve the goals provided under Section 4.002.
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses education curriculum standards, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
